# Undernutrition & malnutrition

::: {.callout-note}
## Chapter in preparation
This Part IV chapter is planned but not yet drafted. It will cover the pathological deficiency state — recognising malnutrition, screening tools (MUST/MNA), the multidisciplinary team, food-first fortification, oral nutritional supplements, and refeeding.

Earlier chapters point here for the clinical detail they defer — for now they handle it at
**recognise-and-refer** altitude, and the full management lands in this chapter.
:::
